ORIPHIM

Deterministic Governance for Autonomous Finance.

Stop Autonomous AI
Before It Breaks.

Stop AI Hallucinations Before They Hit the Order Book. Oriphim intercepts agentic intent in real-time, enforcing mathematical constraints on every transaction. Because in trading, 'almost right' is a regulatory catastrophe.

Core Competencies

PRE-EXECUTION // VALIDATION // COMPLIANCE

01

Pre-Execution Logic

Every AI action is mathematically verified against your fund's risk parameters before it reaches the exchange. No balance violations. No hallucinated assets. Zero-trust execution by design.

02

Real-Time Compliance

Bypass the post-mortem audit cycle. Oriphim maps agent intent directly to MiFID II and Dodd-Frank protocols at the source. Stop violations before they exist.

03

Immutable Proof

Generate cryptographically signed execution logs that prove compliance to regulators instantly. Transform your audit trail from a liability into a competitive advantage.

72-Hour Risk Report for Autonomous Trading Systems

Submit your agent decision logs from staging and get a deterministic risk map in 72 hours. Oriphim flags every action that would violate regulatory rules, breach position limits, or create market-abuse exposure before production rollout.

Request Your 72-Hour Risk Report

The Logic Trap in Autonomous Trading

Most tools tell you what failed after the event. Oriphim acts as a deterministic execution gate that prevents failure states before execution.

ApproachFailure StateOriphim Solution
Monitoring tools
(e.g., Datadog alerts)
You lose money in real-time and find out via alertExecution is blocked before it reaches the order book
Rule engines
Static policy misses semantic hallucinations under market stressSemantic + numeric validation on every action
Human approval gates
You sacrifice 90% of AI speed for 10% more safetyFull-speed execution with sub-millisecond validation
Log analysis
Evidence arrives after exposure, not before riskImmutable chain-of-custody proof
Proxy filters
Operational overhead and latency increase attack surfaceAsync + API-based (no SSL required)
SDK wrappers
Validation faults can corrupt state and break execution loopsAtomic rollback preserves agent state

Request a 72-Hour Risk Report

Start with a deterministic risk assessment, then move to production integration. For full deployment: we accept one hedge fund or financial institution partner per quarter to preserve white-glove onboarding and dedicated validation infrastructure.
